data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the presence of an identity handoff audit trail, which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, the evidence provided does not include any records or actions that demonstrate the existence of such an audit trail. The prior steps do not indicate any functionality related to tracking identity handoffs, leading to a clear gap in the expected requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of an identity handoff audit trail being created or maintained.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Implement identity handoff audit trail
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Ensure that all identity handoffs are logged with relevant details.
